mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which raises corporate revenue expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are not positive in more than 50 percent of months with rising INDPRO, or the rank correlation between INDPRO changes and forward returns is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A cumulative increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points over a trailing three-month window signals deteriorating labor demand and household income prospects, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns are negative in fewer than 45 percent of triggered observations, or the signal's information coefficient is not statistically significant at the 5 percent level over a rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate remains below one percent while consumer prices are accelerating, the resulting negative real policy rate pushes institutional capital out of cash and Treasuries into equities, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition fails to produce positive 5-day returns in more than 55 percent of observations, or the interaction term adds no incremental explanatory power in a regression F-test at the 10 percent level.

mechanism_narrative: Growth in retail sales predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days exclusively during high-unemployment regimes, because demand recoveries are heavily discounted by equity markets only when labor slack confirms scope for non-inflationary expansion.
failure_condition: In months where UNRATE exceeds 6 percent, rising RSAFS fails to coincide with positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55 percent of instances, or the strategy Sharpe ratio is not positive over any 3-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in monthly housing starts signals accelerating residential investment and spillover demand for construction materials, appliances, and mortgage credit, which translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Month-over-month increases in HOUST do not correspond with positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 50 percent of cases, or the rank information coefficient is below 0.03 over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in industrial production and retail sales indicates a goldilocks state where supply capacity meets consumer demand without generating inflationary bottlenecks, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and RSAFS both increase month-over-month
failure_condition: The joint positive movement of INDPRO and RSAFS fails to produce positive 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of joint-up months, or the interaction effect is insignificant at the 5 percent level in a bivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month nonfarm payroll increase exceeding two hundred thousand jobs signals robust labor demand and accelerating wage income, which boosts aggregate demand expectations and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are not positive in at least 55 percent of months where PAYEMS grows by more than two hundred thousand, or the t-statistic of mean excess return is below 1.5 over a rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A trailing three-month annualized inflation rate exceeding three percent, proxied by consumer price index momentum, forces the market to discount tighter future monetary policy and erodes real earnings, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are not negative in at least 50 percent of months where CPIAUCSL momentum exceeds 3 percent annualized, or the rank correlation between inflation momentum and forward returns is above zero.
